+@tool("git_init")

+    """Initialize a new Git repository at the specified path.
+
+    Args:
+        path: Path to initialize the repository at
+
+    Returns:
+        Result of the git init command
+    """
+    return git_init(args)
+

 export default function extendHeading(heading) {

--- a/src/hermes/commands/cli.py
+++ b/src/hermes/commands/cli.py
@@ -63,7 +63,15 @@ def run_command(self, command, options=None):
         if options:
-            logger.info(f"Options: {options}")
+            # Mask sensitive values in options before logging
+            masked_options = []
+            for opt in options:
+                if opt.startswith('-O '):
+                    # Mask the value after -O
+                    masked_options.append('-O ***')
+                else:
+                    masked_options.append(opt)
+            logger.info(f"Options: {' '.join(masked_options)}")
         else:
             logger.info("No options provided")

diff --git a/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb b/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
+++ b/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 module StimulusReflex
   class ReflexFactory
+    include StimulusReflex::Reflex::ClassMethods
     extend ActiveSupport::Autoload
 
     autoload :Reflex
@@ -15,6 +16,22 @@ module StimulusReflex
       end
     end
 
+    def self.reflex_class?(klass)
+      klass.ancestors.include?(StimulusReflex::Reflex)
+    end
+
+    def self.allowed_method?(reflex, method_name)
+      return false unless reflex.class.ancestors.include?(StimulusReflex::Reflex)
+
+      ancestors = reflex.class.ancestors[0..reflex.class.ancestors.index(StimulusReflex::Reflex) - 1]
+      ancestors.any? { |a| a.public_instance_methods(false).include?(method_name.to_sym) }
+    end
+
     def self.build(reflex_class_name, reflex_data)
       reflex_class = reflex_class_name.constantize
       reflex = reflex_class.new(reflex_data)
@@ -22,6 +39,11 @@ module StimulusReflex
       reflex
     end
 
+    def self.invoke(reflex, method_name, arguments)
+      raise ArgumentError, "Reflex method '#{method_name}' is not defined on class '#{reflex.class.name}' or on any of its ancestors" unless allowed_method?(reflex, method_name)
+      reflex.public_send(method_name, *arguments)
+    end
+
     def self.reflexes
       @reflexes ||= []
     end
diff --git a/test/reflex_factory_test.rb b/test/reflex_factory_test.rb
index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/test/reflex_factory_test.rb
+++ b/test/reflex_factory_test.rb
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 require "test_helper"
 
+require "stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory"
 
 class ReflexFactoryTest < Minitest::Test
   def test_build
@@ -10,6 +11,25 @@ class ReflexFactoryTest < Minitest::Test
     assert_equal "test", reflex.reflex_data["test"]
   end
 
+  def test_allowed_method
+    reflex = StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.build("TestReflex", {})
+    assert StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.allowed_method?(reflex, :test_method)
+    refute StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.allowed_method?(reflex, :instance_variable_set)
+    refute StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.allowed_method?(reflex, :system)
+    refute StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.allowed_method?(reflex, :send)
+    refute StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.allowed_method?(reflex, :instance_eval)
+  end
+
+  def test_invoke_with_allowed_method
+    reflex = StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.build("TestReflex", {})
+    assert_nothing_raised do
+      StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.invoke(reflex, :test_method, [])
+    end
+  end
+
+  def test_invoke_with_disallowed_method
+    reflex = StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.build("TestReflex", {})
+    assert_raises(ArgumentError) { StimulusReflex::ReflexFactory.invoke(reflex, :instance_variable_set, ["@test", "value"]) }
+  end
 end

-        Ok(QeIdentity {

+        let mut qe_identity = QeIdentity {

+    /// Verify the QE Identity signature against the issuer certificate chain
+    fn verify_signature(&self) -> Result<()> {
+        let issuer_cert = self.qe_identity_issuer_chain.first()
+            .ok_or_else(|| crate::error::Error::InvalidCollateral("Missing issuer certificate"))?;
+        
+        verify_signature(
+            &self.qe_identity,
+            &self.qe_identity_signature,
+            issuer_cert,
+        )?;
+        
+        Ok(())
+    }
+    
+    /// Enforce policy constraints on the QE Report
+    fn enforce_policy(&self) -> Result<()> {
+        // Verify MRSIGNER matches expected value
+        if self.qe_report.mrsigner != crate::policy::EXPECTED_MRSIGNER {
+            return Err(crate::error::Error::PolicyViolation("MRSIGNER mismatch"));
+        }
+        
+        // Verify ISVPRODID is within acceptable range
+        if self.qe_report.isvprodid > crate::policy::MAX_ISVPRODID {
+            return Err(crate::error::Error::PolicyViolation("ISVPRODID out of range"));
+        }
+        
+        // Verify ISVSVN meets minimum version requirement
+        if self.qe_report.isvsvn < crate::policy::MIN_ISVSVN {
+            return Err(crate::error::Error::PolicyViolation("ISVSVN below minimum"));
+        }
+        
+        Ok(())
+    }
 }

+/// Policy constraints for QE Report verification
+
+/// Expected MRSIGNER value for trusted QE
+pub const EXPECTED_MRSIGNER: [u8; 32] = [
+    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
+    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
+    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
+    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,
+];
+
+/// Maximum allowed ISVPRODID value
+pub const MAX_ISVPRODID: u16 = 0xFFFF;
+
+/// Minimum required ISVSVN version
+pub const MIN_ISVSVN: u16 = 1;

+use crate::error::Result;
+
+/// Verify a signature against a certificate
+pub fn verify_signature(
+    data: &[u8],
+    signature: &[u8],
+    certificate: &[u8],
+) -> Result<()> {
+    // Extract public key from certificate
+    let public_key = extract_public_key(certificate)?;
+    
+    // Verify signature using public key
+    if !verify_ecdsa_signature(data, signature, &public_key)? {
+        return Err(crate::error::Error::InvalidSignature(
+            "QE Identity signature verification failed"
+        ));
+    }
+    
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+fn extract_public_key(certificate: &[u8]) -> Result<Vec<u8>> {
+    // Extract public key from X.509 certificate
+    unimplemented!("Certificate parsing implementation")
+}
+
+fn verify_ecdsa_signature(data: &[u8], signature: &[u8], public_key: &[u8]) -> Result<bool> {
+    // Verify ECDSA signature
+    unimplemented!("ECDSA signature verification implementation")
+}

 class AdamWeightDecayOptimizer(AdamW):
+    @staticmethod

+function sanitizeFilename(filename: string): string {
+  // Remove path separators and control characters to prevent path traversal
+  const sanitized = filename.replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]/g, '_')
+  // Ensure filename doesn't start with dot or contain null bytes
+  if (sanitized.startsWith('.') || sanitized.includes('\0')) {
+    return 'image'
+  }
+  // Limit filename length
+  return sanitized.substring(0, 255)
+}
+
+function validateContentDisposition(value: string): string {
+  // Only allow safe Content-Disposition values
+  return value.replace(/filename[^=]*=[^;]*;?/gi, '')
+}
